title: Pamposh Single Duvet Cover Set Premium Brushed Microfiber Duvet Cover Single Ultrasoft Hypoallergenic Reversible Single Duvet Set Non Iron Luxury Bedding Set With Zipper Closure
features: Premium Quality Fabric: Pamposh single duvet cover set are crafted with the finest quality microfiber material, double brushed on both sides for ultra softness and comfort. Lightweight, breathable, cool & supple to the touch. Pamposh makes classy soft bedding for a smooth sleeping experience to make you feel refreshed and rejuvenated after every sleep.

2 Pcs Bedding Set Includes : 1 x Double sided reversible single duvet cover + 1 x Standard size matching double sided reversible pillow cases (50 cm x 75 cm). Our luxury duvet cover single comes with zipper closure having 4 inside corner ties to avoid slipping & keep your duvet cover, quilt and down comforter in the right place.

Quality Excellence: Every inch of our single duvet set meets top notch quality to ensure comfort, smoothness, colour fastness, strength & durability. Extensive product research, inspection checks & ongoing factory audits for additional sustainability is a routine process at Pamposh.

Oeko-Tex Complied: The Oeko-Tex compliance confirms no harmful materials or chemicals are involved in manufacturing of our single bed duvet cover set. We have ensured highest standards in environment protection along with quality production. Our new luxury microfiber single duvet covers will bring utmost safety & comfort to your home.

Care & Washing: Easy care and machine wash makes this duvet set single long lasting. Machine washable with cold water. Top standard making to withstand frequent washing. Can be tumbled on low heat to dry. Do not bleach & dry clean. Ideal for busy and modern lifestyles.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page PAMPOSH DELUXE DUVET COVER SET (2 IN 1) - DOUBLE BRUSHED ON BOTH SIDES FOR ULTRA SOFTNESS & COMFORT 1 HIGH GRADE FABRIC 2 LUXURY PATTERNS 3 REVERSIBLE DESIGN 4 SIDE B - PLAIN BLACK 5 ENDURING DURABILITY CRAFTED WITH METICULOUS ATTENTION TO DETAIL FOR SUPREME CLASSY FINISH Pamposh duvet set is tightly woven for an extreme elegant finish, double brushed on both sides ensuring superior comfort and unparalleled softness, surpassing the quality and durability of egyptian cotton duvet sets, ensuring a cozy night sleep. Engineered with precision & reinforced seams. RARE WAVES FLORAL PATTERN IN BLACK AND WHITE ON SIDE-A & PLAIN BLACK ON SIDE-B OEKO-TEX CERTIFIED MATERIALS Oeko-Tex certification to ensure usage of chemical free materials. Say goodbye to the irritation caused by allergens, dust mites, and other triggers. REVERSIBLE DESIGN (2 IN 1) Experience the freedom of versatility with our 2-in-1 duvet cover set offering the liberty to effortlessly switch between two stylish designs. ZIPPER CLOSURE Freedom and convenience of zipper closure, offering effortless bedding changes and ensuring your duvet stays securely in place night after night. 4 INSIDE CORNER TIES Ensuring your duvet stays perfectly in place, providing you with uninterrupted comfort throughout the night after night. Featuring timeless patterns and luxurious fabrics, each set is meticulously crafted to elevate the ambiance of your bedroom. Embrace versatility with our reversible feature, allowing you to effortlessly switch between two chic styles to suit your mood and decor. Experience the epitome of sophistication and comfort with our collection, where elegance meets functionality.
